page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.t5-lc1m1.small is a burstable virtual machine instance belonging to the ecs.t5 family. It is powered by a single-core Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 2.5 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. This KVM-based instance is equipped with 1.0 GB of system memory, providing a 1:1 ratio of vCPUs to memory. It does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, and features a baseline network bandwidth of 0 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks place this instance in the lower tiers of compute and memory capabilities. The stress-ng single-core and multi-core CPU tests both recorded a score of 1064.79, reflecting its entry-level processing capacity. Memory bandwidth benchmarks show a read-only small block cached speed of 76.47 GB/sec, which drops to 8.43 GB/sec for large uncached blocks, alongside a write speed of 6.75 GB/sec. The Passmark CPU score is 1212.67, with database operations and memory scores registering at minimal levels. Despite these constraints, the instance achieved a Redis SET operations throughput of 1.34 million operations per second and a static web serving throughput of 1.28 GB/sec.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the burstable CPU allocation model makes this instance suitable for low-utilization workloads where continuous high performance is not required. It represents a budget-friendly option for lightweight tasks, but users must consider the performance tradeoffs associated with its limited memory and lack of local storage. Appropriate workloads include basic static web serving, lightweight microservices, development testing, and low-traffic background processes.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.t5-lc1m1.small is an entry-level, burstable instance from the ecs.t5 family, utilizing a single-core Intel Xeon 8269CY processor clocked at 2.5 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. Equipped with 1.0 GB of RAM, this KVM-based server does not include local storage, dedicated GPUs, or baseline network bandwidth. Benchmark results indicate limited compute and memory performance, with a stress-ng CPU score of 1064.79 and a Passmark CPU score of 1212.67. However, it sustains a static web serving throughput of 1.28 GB/sec and 1.34 million Redis SET operations per second. This profile offers a highly cost-efficient solution for workloads with low CPU utilization. It is best suited for lightweight applications, development environments, and basic web serving.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.t5-lc1m1.small is a burstable KVM instance featuring 1 vCPU, 1.0 GB of RAM, and an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor, designed for low-cost, lightweight utility workloads.

tagline: A budget-friendly, burstable single-core instance designed for lightweight utility workloads and basic web serving without local storage.

1.0 GB of system memory with a burstable CPU allocation model
